Iran's Revolutionary Guards: Ceasefire in all fronts including Lebanon was Tehran's initial condition for an end to the war with the US.

IAEA Report: In light of Iran's continued unwillingness to address unresolved safeguards issues, the IAEA has outstanding concerns about the possible presence of undeclared nuclear material and activities in Iran.
IAEA Report: Consequently, the IAEA cannot verify the status, for safeguards purposes, of these facilities and associated nuclear material.
IAEA report reiterates that it is critical for the IAEA to conduct verification activities in Iran without delay.
IAEA report reiterates that it is indispensable and urgent to implement effectively the NPT safeguards agreement in Iran, and that its implementation cannot be suspended.
IAEA Report shows IAEA estimates of Iran's enriched uranium stocks up to June 13th, 2025, are unchanged from previous reports.
IAEA sends two quarterly reports on Iran to member states.

IAEA Report: IAEA has neither received information from Iran regarding the status of its declared nuclear material or facilities nor had access to any of those facilities to conduct in-field verification activities.
Iran allowed IAEA to inspect Bushehr Nuclear plant June 1st-3rd
